name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax offers secured title loans and flex lines of credit using your car title, plus unsecured personal lines of credit — with same-day cash and most credit types accepted.
description_long:
TitleMax is one of the nation's largest title lending chains, with this Summer Avenue Memphis location operating since February 2007. The company targets consumers who need fast access to cash and may not qualify for traditional bank loans, positioning its vehicle-secured products as an alternative path to emergency funding regardless of credit history. The Memphis location serves a bilingual customer base and holds a 5.0-star average across 481+ Google reviews.

The core product is a title pledge — a secured loan using a clear vehicle title as collateral. Borrowers keep driving their vehicle while the loan is outstanding. Alongside title pledges, TitleMax offers a Flex Line of Credit, which functions as a revolving secured credit line allowing withdrawals up to an approved limit over time rather than as a single lump sum. For customers without a vehicle title, TitleMax also provides an unsecured flexible line of credit available both in-store and online, requiring proof of identity, an active bank account, and proof of income.

What distinguishes TitleMax from payday lenders is the secured line-of-credit structure, which gives borrowers flexibility to draw funds incrementally rather than taking a fixed lump sum. The company performs a credit check but emphasizes that vehicle equity — not credit score alone — is the primary underwriting factor, making approval accessible to consumers with poor or limited credit histories. Bilingual staffing at this location broadens accessibility for Spanish-speaking customers.

TitleMax occupies a high-cost lending niche. While the website highlights 'competitive rates' and 'manageable payments,' no specific APR figures are disclosed on this store page — a meaningful omission given that title loans typically carry triple-digit APRs. The core risk is vehicle repossession: failure to repay means losing the collateral. Online unsecured products are restricted to 11 states, limiting availability. This product is best suited as a last-resort option for consumers facing a genuine short-term cash emergency who have exhausted lower-cost alternatives.
pros: Same-day cash disbursement — loan funded during the store visit
Accepts most credit types; vehicle equity is primary underwriting factor, not credit score alone
Borrowers keep driving their vehicle while the loan is active
Flex Line of Credit allows incremental withdrawals up to credit limit rather than forcing a lump-sum draw
Unsecured line of credit available for customers without a vehicle title
481+ Google reviews averaging 5.0 stars at this specific Memphis location
cons: No APR or rate information disclosed on the store page — cost of borrowing is opaque
Vehicle is at risk of repossession if the loan is not repaid
Online unsecured line of credit restricted to only 11 states (AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI)
Store closed on Sundays, limiting emergency access on weekends
Credit check is still performed despite vehicle collateral, adding a hard inquiry
best_for: Vehicle owners with a clear title who need same-day cash and have poor or thin credit
Consumers who want a revolving credit line secured by their vehicle rather than a one-time lump-sum loan
Spanish-speaking borrowers in the Memphis area who need bilingual loan assistance
Borrowers who have been declined by banks and credit unions and need fast emergency funding
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for consumers who own a paid-off vehicle, need cash the same day, and cannot access bank loans or credit union alternatives. The main caveat is cost transparency: no rates are shown on the site, and title loans industry-wide carry very high APRs with vehicle repossession as the consequence of default — making this a high-risk option that should follow, not replace, lower-cost alternatives.
services: Flex Line of Credit (revolving secured credit line against vehicle title)
Unsecured flexible line of credit (in-store and online)
Vehicle value assessment for loan sizing
Loan payment management via customer portal
